acceptance_criteria.given: the dev subagent has staged the files listed in Evidence (M1 + M2 + M3 output)
acceptance_criteria.when: git log --oneline -3 is run in /dev/shm/dev-workspace/dot-claude and git show HEAD --name-only is inspected
acceptance_criteria.then: the most recent commit message contains '20260524-123039' or 'session wrap-up' and git show HEAD --name-only includes commands/INDEX.md, commands/commit.md, hooks/INDEX.md, hooks/pretool-git-privilege-guard.py, docs/dev/INDEX.md, docs/dev/ticket-20260524-122910.md, docs/dev/acceptance-criteria-20260524-123039.json, docs/dev/context-20260524-123039.json, docs/dev/style-inspector-report-20260524-101700.json, docs/dev/ticket-20260524-123039.md, and docs/dev/note-20260524-123039-root-bin-manual-commit.md

acceptance_criteria.description: Manual-commit note exists with exact commands
acceptance_criteria.then: the file contains: the exact path /root/bin/happy-session-recovery.sh; the repo root /root; a 'git add /root/bin/happy-session-recovery.sh' command; a 'git commit -m ...' command with a descriptive message; and the three Gap descriptions (tombstone timing, snapshot persistence, MemoryMax defaults) copied from docs/dev/close-report-20260524-101700.md

the file records that .claude/workflow-c216ded5-b7e1-4432-b79f-a6a2042971fe.json contains "command": "redev" (not "close"), confirming the /close stuck state for session c216ded5 was replaced by the /redev invocation and is therefore resolved
